title: dolichos prostratus
intro: Dolichos prostratus, also known as the climbing bean or dolichos, is a type of plant that belongs to the legume family. It is native to tropical Africa and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of dolichos prostratus include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and aiding in the treatment of various infections. Dolichos prostratus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
